stance: Risk-on momentum-led BFSI; overweight exchanges and rising-revision lenders/insurers, cut the falling-revision laggards.
experience_note: This is an early round with a null last_round_review, so there is no prior-round grade to learn from yet; I am pre-registering theses for honest scoring. What I am watching: (1) whether the exchange momentum (MCX/BSE) persists or mean-reverts after such an extreme momentum z — a roll-over there would be my first sign I over-chased a single factor; (2) whether the rising-revision SFB/insurer turnarounds (Equitas, Niva Bupa, Canara HSBC Life, Bandhan) convert firming revisions into actual price momentum within 1-2 quarters, since revisions are only a small ~1-6mo tilt, not a guarantee; (3) whether cutting the large-cap quality laggards (HDFC Bank/HDFC Life) hurts in a risk-off tape — that is my deliberate beta-down bet and the place I am most exposed if the cycle turns defensive. Note: three current holdings (FUSION, MASFIN, ARSSBL) are not present in the candidate universe, so I cannot file explicit exit tickets for them; I leave their reconciliation to the guardrail and do not re-add them.
